headline: Robinhood CEO Vlad Tenev Opened Up About What Success Means To Him And The Legacy He Would Be 'Excited' To Tell His Grandkids
summary: Vlad Tenev, CEO of Robinhood Markets Inc. (NASDAQ: HOOD), said success to him means creating more value for the world than for oneself.

raw.headline: Robinhood CEO Vlad Tenev Opened Up About What Success Means To Him And The Legacy He Would Be 'Excited' To Tell His Grandkids

headline: Prediction Markets are a $1 trillion market by 2030, Bernstein says
summary: Investing.com -- The emerging sector for prediction markets, specialized platforms where users trade contracts based on the outcomes of sporting, business, economic, and political events, is set for explosive growth, according to a new report from Bernstein.
